newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Map-wide clipping fixes and geometry polish.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed some spots where bomb would be unreachable when dropped.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed dynamic shadows breaking in some spots.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed some surface sound types.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed hand popping when counter-strafing with a grenade equipped.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Limit aim punch to 90 degrees.[/p][/*][*][p]Added secondary intersection trace for partially-occluded thirdperson weapons.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted ground smoothing at locations where sloped ground surfaces join with step-height transitions.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed issue that caused defuse-cables from completely occluded players to also be occluded.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed 'FATAL ERROR: Failed to on-demand compile shader' affecting some older GPUs.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Map-wide clipping fixes and geometry polish.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed some spots where bomb would be unreachable when dropped.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed dynamic shadows breaking in some spots.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed some surface sound types.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed hand popping when counter-strafing with a grenade equipped.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Limit aim punch to 90 degrees.[/p][/*][*][p]Added secondary intersection trace for partially-occluded thirdperson weapons.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted ground smoothing at locations where sloped ground surfaces join with step-height transitions.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed issue that caused defuse-cables from completely occluded players to also be occluded.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed 'FATAL ERROR: Failed to on-demand compile shader' affecting some older GPUs.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]缓存[/p][list][*][p]地图范围内的裁剪修复和几何图形抛光。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了投掷炸弹时无法到达的一些位置。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了某些位置的动态阴影中断问题。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了一些表面声音类型。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]修复了装备手榴弹进行反扫射时手部弹出的问题。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]将瞄准拳头限制为 90 [/p][/*][*][p]为部分遮挡的第三人称武器添加了辅助交叉轨迹。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了倾斜地面与台阶高度过渡连接的位置处的地面平滑度。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了导致完全遮挡的玩家的引信电缆也被遮挡的问题被遮挡。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了影响某些较旧 GPU 的“致命错误：无法按需编译着色器”。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Bomb explosion radius increased.[/p][/*][*][p]Lighting Adjustments around Vent.[/p][/*][*][p]Disabled player collision on sign and removed lamp by squeaky.[/p][/*][*][p]Reworked e-box on A-site for better visibility.[/p][/*][*][p]Lowered Checkers entrance frame height at B Main.[/p][/*][*][p]Removed AC unit above Sandbags and moved pipes.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed lack of footstep sounds on top of crates at A-site.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed hole in world on door in Sun Room.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed wall bangs on A Main wall.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed some z-fighting around Garage.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted grenade clipping throughout map.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted player clipping throughout map.[/p][/*][/list][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]Blocked visibility through corner of Mid Box (Xbox).[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ SOUND ][/p][list][*][p]Speculative fix for a case where all audio drops out.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed cases where crouch-jumping in confined spaces could cause the player camera to intersect the ceiling.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted particle effect sprite opacity for fully occluded flashbangs.[/p][/*][*][p]Improved smoke lighting consistency.[/p][/*][*][p]Minor adjustments to dropped pistol magazine velocity.[/p][/*][*][p]Ambient Occlusion adjustment settings in Environment Blend shader restored.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where money was subtracted from the wrong player during bot takeover.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Bomb explosion radius increased.[/p][/*][*][p]Lighting Adjustments around Vent.[/p][/*][*][p]Disabled player collision on sign and removed lamp by squeaky.[/p][/*][*][p]Reworked e-box on A-site for better visibility.[/p][/*][*][p]Lowered Checkers entrance frame height at B Main.[/p][/*][*][p]Removed AC unit above Sandbags and moved pipes.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed lack of footstep sounds on top of crates at A-site.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed hole in world on door in Sun Room.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed wall bangs on A Main wall.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed some z-fighting around Garage.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted grenade clipping throughout map.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted player clipping throughout map.[/p][/*][/list][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]Blocked visibility through corner of Mid Box (Xbox).[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ SOUND ][/p][list][*][p]Speculative fix for a case where all audio drops out.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed cases where crouch-jumping in confined spaces could cause the player camera to intersect the ceiling.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted particle effect sprite opacity for fully occluded flashbangs.[/p][/*][*][p]Improved smoke lighting consistency.[/p][/*][*][p]Minor adjustments to dropped pistol magazine velocity.[/p][/*][*][p]Ambient Occlusion adjustment settings in Environment Blend shader restored.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where money was subtracted from the wrong player during bot takeover.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ 地图 ][/p][p]缓存[/p][list][*][p]炸弹爆炸半径增加。[/p][/*][*][p]通风口周围的照明调整。[/p][/*][*][p]禁止玩家在标志上发生碰撞，并通过吱吱声移除灯。[/p][/*][*][p]重新设计了 A 站点上的电子箱，以获得更好的效果能见度。[/p][/*][*][p]降低了 B Main 处的 Checkers 入口框架高度。[/p][/*][*][p]移除了沙袋上方的空调装置并移动了管道。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了 A 站点板条箱顶部缺少脚步声的问题。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了阳光下世界中门上的洞房间。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了主墙上的墙壁刘海。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了车库周围的一些深度冲突。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了整个地图上的手榴弹剪裁。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了整个地图上的玩家剪裁地图。[/p][/*][/list][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]通过 Mid Box (Xbox) 的一角阻挡可见性。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ SOUND ][/p][list][*][p]对所有音频丢失的情况进行推测修复out.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]修复了在密闭空间中蹲伏跳跃可能导致玩家摄像机与天花板相交的情况。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了粒子效果精灵不透明度以实现完全遮挡flashbangs。[/p][/*][*][p]改进了烟雾照明的一致性。[/p][/*][*][p]对掉落的手枪弹匣速度进行了细微调整。[/p][/*][*][p]恢复了环境混合着色器中的环境光遮挡调整设置。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了在机器人过程中从错误的玩家身上扣除金钱的情况接管。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Cache arrives in Counter-Strike 2 while Valve continue working on ANIMGRAPH 2
newsitems.contents:
A return of a classic, the popular Cache map has finally returned with the latest Counter-Strike 2 update that's out now. Nice to see more content arrive!

Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/04/cache-arrives-in-counter-strike-2-while-valve-continue-working-on-animgraph-2/
newsitems.title_en: Cache arrives in Counter-Strike 2 while Valve continue working on ANIMGRAPH 2
newsitems.contents_en:
A return of a classic, the popular Cache map has finally returned with the latest Counter-Strike 2 update that's out now. Nice to see more content arrive!

Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/04/cache-arrives-in-counter-strike-2-while-valve-continue-working-on-animgraph-2/
newsitems.title_cn: Cache 抵达《反恐精英 2》，而 Valve 仍在继续开发 ANIMGRAPH 2
newsitems.contents_cn:
经典回归，广受欢迎的缓存地图终于在《反恐精英 2》最新更新中回归。很高兴看到更多内容到来！

在此处阅读全文： https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/04/cache-arrives-in-counter-strike-2-while-valve-continue-working-on-animgraph-2/

newsitems.title: The Return Of Cache
newsitems.author: Gautam
newsitems.contents:
[video webm="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/c2e89d3e3ea290a9a7ac0f4ff472b3c51b81dec5.webm" mp4="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/2a3251dedbc1d4ffcac5e644280893c52f053b5a.mp4" poster="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/fb8e14e605a2594a80077e059692601acefafaae.png" autoplay="true" controls="false"][/video]

Today's update features the return of a classic. Welcome back, Cache!

Cache veterans will feel right at home in familiar locations, while new players can quickly learn the ins and outs of a classic three lane map that rewards strategy and teamplay.

You can find Cache in Casual, Competitive, Deathmatch and Retakes modes (for now). 

Don't forget to clear Forklift, and we'll see you on the server.
newsitems.contents_en:
[video webm="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/c2e89d3e3ea290a9a7ac0f4ff472b3c51b81dec5.webm" mp4="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/2a3251dedbc1d4ffcac5e644280893c52f053b5a.mp4" poster="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/fb8e14e605a2594a80077e059692601acefafaae.png" autoplay="true" controls="false"][/video]

Today's update features the return of a classic. Welcome back, Cache!

Cache veterans will feel right at home in familiar locations, while new players can quickly learn the ins and outs of a classic three lane map that rewards strategy and teamplay.

You can find Cache in Casual, Competitive, Deathmatch and Retakes modes (for now). 

Don't forget to clear Forklift, and we'll see you on the server.
newsitems.contents_cn:
[视频 webm="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/c2e89d3e3ea290a9a7ac0f4ff472b3c51b81dec5.webm" mp4="https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/2a3251dedbc1d4ffcac5e644280893c52f053b5a.mp4"海报=“https://clan.fastly.steamstatic.com/images/3381077/fb8e14e605a2594a80077e059692601acefafaae.png”autoplay=“true”controls=“false”][/video]

今天的更新让经典回归。欢迎回来，卡什！

老玩家会在熟悉的地点感到宾至如归，而新玩家则可以快速了解经典三车道地图的细节，奖励策略和团队合作。

您可以在休闲、竞技、死亡竞赛和重夺模式中找到缓存（目前）。 

别忘了清除叉车，我们服务器上见。

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Added Cache to Competitive, Casual, Deathmatch, and Retakes modes.[/p][/*][/list][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]Uncovered Mid Box (Xbox) to reveal a previously hidden jump spot. On purpose this time.[/p][/*][/list][p]Office[/p][list][*][p]Enabled collision on tarp on boxes used around CT spawn.[/p][/*][/list][p]Stronghold[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3477094554"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p]Poseidon[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3522144043"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations.[/p][/*][*][p]Talon and Karambit knives are now held correctly while defusing.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ SOUND ][/p][list][*][p]Minor mix changes and adjustments.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed issue where C4 equip sound was not getting interrupted by other equip sounds.[/p][/*][*][p]Removed first-person death sound effect that played in the case of music kit death cue being inaudible.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Shader fix for AO while using alpha test causing overly dark and chunky silhouettes, as seen on railings in Mirage.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where it was possible to hold no weapon by requesting a hand switch after throwing a grenade.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MAPS ][/p][p]Cache[/p][list][*][p]Added Cache to Competitive, Casual, Deathmatch, and Retakes modes.[/p][/*][/list][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]Uncovered Mid Box (Xbox) to reveal a previously hidden jump spot. On purpose this time.[/p][/*][/list][p]Office[/p][list][*][p]Enabled collision on tarp on boxes used around CT spawn.[/p][/*][/list][p]Stronghold[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3477094554"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p]Poseidon[/p][list][*][p]Updated to the latest version from the Community Workshop ([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3522144043"]Update Notes[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations.[/p][/*][*][p]Talon and Karambit knives are now held correctly while defusing.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ SOUND ][/p][list][*][p]Minor mix changes and adjustments.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed issue where C4 equip sound was not getting interrupted by other equip sounds.[/p][/*][*][p]Removed first-person death sound effect that played in the case of music kit death cue being inaudible.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Shader fix for AO while using alpha test causing overly dark and chunky silhouettes, as seen on railings in Mirage.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where it was possible to hold no weapon by requesting a hand switch after throwing a grenade.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ 地图 ][/p][p]缓存[/p][list][*][p]在竞技、休闲、死亡竞赛和重拍模式中添加了缓存。[/p][/*][/list][p]Dust II[/p][list][*][p]揭开中间盒 (Xbox) 以显示之前隐藏的跳跃点。这次是故意的。[/p][/*][/list][p]Office[/p][list][*][p]在 CT 生成点周围使用的盒子上的防水布上启用了碰撞。[/p][/*][/list][p]要塞[/p][list][*][p]已更新到社区研讨会的最新版本([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3477094554"]更新说明[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p]Poseidon[/p][list][*][p]已更新至社区研讨会的最新版本([url="https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/changelog/3522144043"]更新说明[/url])[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]对视图模型动画进行细微调整。[/p][/*][*][p]Talon 和现在，在拆弹时可以正确握住卡拉姆比特刀。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[声音][/p][list][*][p]轻微的混音更改和调整。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了 C4 装备声音不会被其他装备声音打断的问题。[/p][/*][*][p]删除了第一人称死亡声音在音乐套件死亡提示听不见的情况下播放的效果。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]使用 alpha 测试时对 AO 进行着色器修复，导致轮廓过于黑暗和粗壮，如 Mirage 中的栏杆上所示。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了通过请求无法持有武器的情况投掷手榴弹后的手动开关。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed XM1014 shells flickering when starting a reload.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed bugs with dual berettas in first person and in spectator mode.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed inspect/cancel causing multiple worldmodel deploys.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where players can get stuck in a planted-turn state.[/p][/*][*][p]Made foot IK transitions smoother.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted the firstperson in-air crouch transition time to match the thirdperson animation better.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where high frequency stutter steps would cause large pose changes.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where legs would snap when quickly stopping and then continuing in same direction.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted thirdperson bomb plant animation to more closely match firstperson animation.[/p][/*][*][p]Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed random crash on startup when a non-default Audio Device was specified in settings or when sound_device_override was specified in a config file or on the command line.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted official map guides to match new surface smoothing.[/p][/*][*][p]Dropped weapons with silencers now correctly reflect the silenced state.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed XM1014 shells flickering when starting a reload.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed bugs with dual berettas in first person and in spectator mode.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed inspect/cancel causing multiple worldmodel deploys.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where players can get stuck in a planted-turn state.[/p][/*][*][p]Made foot IK transitions smoother.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted the firstperson in-air crouch transition time to match the thirdperson animation better.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where high frequency stutter steps would cause large pose changes.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a case where legs would snap when quickly stopping and then continuing in same direction.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted thirdperson bomb plant animation to more closely match firstperson animation.[/p][/*][*][p]Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed random crash on startup when a non-default Audio Device was specified in settings or when sound_device_override was specified in a config file or on the command line.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted official map guides to match new surface smoothing.[/p][/*][*][p]Dropped weapons with silencers now correctly reflect the silenced state.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]修复了开始重新加载时 XM1014 炮弹闪烁的问题。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了第一人称和旁观者模式下双贝雷塔的错误。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了检查/取消导致多个世界模型的问题部署。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了玩家可能卡在踩踏转弯状态的错误。[/p][/*][*][p]使脚部 IK 过渡更加平滑。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了第一人称空中蹲伏过渡时间，以更好地匹配第三人称动画。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了高频的情况断断续续的脚步会导致较大的姿势变化。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了快速停止然后继续朝同一方向前进时腿会折断的情况。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了第三人称炸弹工厂动画，以更紧密地匹配第一人称动画。[/p][/*][*][p]对视图模型进行了细微调整动画。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]修复了在设置中指定非默认音频设备或在配置文件或命令行中指定 sound_device_override 时启动时的随机崩溃。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了官方地图指南以匹配新表面平滑。[/p][/*][*][p]带有消音器的掉落武器现在可以正确反映静音状态。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ GAMEPLAY ][/p][list][*][p]Adjusted ground smoothing at locations where the player can stand on very thin ledges.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Corrected some improper character texture assignments.[/p][/*][*][p]Trade offers containing Counter-Strike 2 items are now limited to 1,000 items.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ GAMEPLAY ][/p][list][*][p]Adjusted ground smoothing at locations where the player can stand on very thin ledges.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Corrected some improper character texture assignments.[/p][/*][*][p]Trade offers containing Counter-Strike 2 items are now limited to 1,000 items.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ GAMEPLAY ][/p][list][*][p]调整了玩家可以站在非常薄的壁架上的位置的地面平滑度。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]对视图模型进行了细微调整动画。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]更正了一些不正确的角色纹理分配。[/p][/*][*][p]包含《反恐精英 2》物品的贸易优惠现已限制为 1,000 件。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ GAMEPLAY ][/p][list][*][p]Adjusted camera motion due to recoil to match CS:GO more closely. Bullet trajectories should continue to match CS2.[/p][/*][*][p]Players will now experience the full camera motion due to external sources of aim punch (e.g. getting shot) regardless of network latency. The effects of aim punch on bullet trajectories are still applied immediately on the server.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed several cases where crouch transitions in the air were instantaneous.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where MVP panel characters weren't resetting correctly.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ GAMEPLAY ][/p][list][*][p]Adjusted camera motion due to recoil to match CS:GO more closely. Bullet trajectories should continue to match CS2.[/p][/*][*][p]Players will now experience the full camera motion due to external sources of aim punch (e.g. getting shot) regardless of network latency. The effects of aim punch on bullet trajectories are still applied immediately on the server.[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed several cases where crouch transitions in the air were instantaneous.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a bug where MVP panel characters weren't resetting correctly.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ GAMEPLAY ][/p][list][*][p]调整了后坐力导致的摄像机运动，以更接近地匹配 CS:GO。子弹轨迹应继续与 CS2 相匹配。[/p][/*][*][p]无论网络延迟如何，玩家现在都将体验到由于外部瞄准源（例如被射击）而导致的完整摄像机运动。瞄准拳对子弹轨迹的影响仍然会立即应用到服务器上。[/p][/*][/list][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]对视图模型动画进行细微调整。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了几种在空中蹲伏过渡的情况瞬时。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了 MVP 面板字符无法正确重置的错误。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: jo
newsitems.contents: [p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a bug that removed the delay between burst fire bullets.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en: [p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a bug that removed the delay between burst fire bullets.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn: [p]\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]修复了消除连发子弹之间延迟的错误。[/p][/*][/list]

newsitems.title: Counter-Strike 2 Update
newsitems.author: Piggles ULTRAPRO
newsitems.contents:
[p]All changes from the animgraph_2_beta build are now live.[/p][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted general weapon deploy animation logic.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed issues with transitioning between knife attacks.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed Elites not shooting in third-person.[/p][/*][/list][p]
\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a bug that allowed silently climbing ladders at run speed by sporadically tapping movement keys.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted ground smoothing at locations where sloped ground surfaces transition to flat ground.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed held grenades inheriting incorrect scale in some circumstances such as after being dropped and picked up.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a crash at halftime when transitioning from CT to T.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_en:
[p]All changes from the animgraph_2_beta build are now live.[/p][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]Minor adjustments to viewmodel animations.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted general weapon deploy animation logic.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed issues with transitioning between knife attacks.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed Elites not shooting in third-person.[/p][/*][/list][p]
\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]Fixed a bug that allowed silently climbing ladders at run speed by sporadically tapping movement keys.[/p][/*][*][p]Adjusted ground smoothing at locations where sloped ground surfaces transition to flat ground.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed held grenades inheriting incorrect scale in some circumstances such as after being dropped and picked up.[/p][/*][*][p]Fixed a crash at halftime when transitioning from CT to T.[/p][/*][/list]
newsitems.contents_cn:
[p]animgraph_2_beta 版本中的所有更改现已生效。[/p][p][/p][p]\[ ANIMGRAPH 2 ][/p][list][*][p]对视图模型动画进行了细微调整。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了一般武器部署动画逻辑。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了刀之间转换的问题攻击。[/p][/*][*][p]修复精英不以第三人称射击的问题。[/p][/*][/list][p]
\[ MISC ][/p][list][*][p]修复了一个错误，该错误允许通过偶尔点击移动键以运行速度悄悄攀登梯子。[/p][/*][*][p]调整了倾斜地面过渡到平坦地面的位置的地面平滑度。[/p][/*][*][p]修复了持有的手榴弹在某些情况下继承不正确的比例，例如在掉落和拾取后up.[/p][/*][*][p]修复了从CT转换到T时中场休息时的崩溃问题。[/p][/*][/list]
